description: Researched and confirmed the correct confined-space provision via direct law.go.kr search after legalize_kr/kr_safety both failed to index this 규칙-level rule; fixed confined-space-rescue to cite 산업안전보건기준에 관한 규칙 Article 623 (감시인의 배치 등).
verification_note: bun scripts/safety-audit.ts re-run after fix — 618 files checked, 0 errors.
